# Fully-resolved dependency closure for pyproject.toml's [project.dependencies]
# + [project.optional-dependencies.dev], generated by installing exactly
# those pinned top-level packages into a clean, empty virtual environment
# and freezing it — NOT filtered from the pre-existing 1GB dev venv (which
# has ~900 unrelated packages from other projects). Regenerate with:
#
#   python -m venv /tmp/lockcheck && /tmp/lockcheck/Scripts/pip install \
#     -e ".[dev]" && /tmp/lockcheck/Scripts/pip freeze > requirements-lock.txt
#
# Install: pip install -r requirements-lock.txt
